name: Broccoli and Macaroni with Lots of Garlic
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the broccoli into halves and trim the tough outer layer from the bottom half, discarding it. Slice the tops and bottoms lengthwise, then chop into small pieces.
2. Peel the garlic cloves and chop them into tiny pieces.
3. Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven until very hot. Add the chopped garlic and cook for about 5 minutes. Then add the broccoli and cover to cook until tender over low heat for about 25-30 minutes.
4. Stir in the garlic powder, salt, and Romano cheese (to taste). Cook for an additional 5 minutes.
5. Cook one pound of macaroni according to package directions and drain it.
6. Place the cooked macaroni in a large bowl and pour the broccoli and oil mixture over it. Mix well. Sprinkle more Romano cheese on top. Serve.
